## Publication Safety

- [ ] No secrets, private data, raw logs, private working notes, internal
      ledgers, or raw process logs are included.
- [ ] Public claims are backed by repo-visible docs, code, tests, commands, or
      linked issues.
- [ ] Screenshots/logs are sanitized if attached.
